validation_policy: No model calls; deterministic candidates compared to existing load_exect_gold_documents() seizure_frequencies.
scorer_caveats: Frequency gold comes from ExECT SeizureFrequency annotations.
Seizure-frequency rows are not seizure-type gold.
Gan monthly normalization and unknown/no-reference policy are excluded.
Test split remains holdout; this report is a validation representability gate.
